SEARCH

Package com.example.junimoapp.admin

package com.example.junimoapp.admin
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.example.junimoapp
     
  • Class
    Description
    AdminBrowseEventsActivity
    AdminBrowseEventsActivity allows an administrator to view all events stored in Firestore and permanently delete any of them.
    AdminBrowseImagesActivity
    Allows admin to browse images uploaded (event posters and profile pictures) and remove any that violate app policy US 03.03.01 - As an admin, I want to be able to remove images US 03.06.01 - As an admin, I want to browse images
    AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity
    activity for admin to browse/remove organizers diaplays list of all organizers, allows admin to demote organizers to users and deletes all events they made Implements User story 03.05.01
    AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
    Activity where admins can browse and remove user profiles Implements user story 03.02.01
    AdminCommentAdapter
    AdminCommentAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter for AdminEventDetailActivity Each row is a comment's author and the "Remove" button so the admin can delete comments that violate app policy (and note which user to remove if necessary).
    AdminCommentAdapter.CommentItem
    CommentItem contains one comment row
    AdminCommentAdapter.CommentViewHolder
    CommentViewHolder holds reference to views in one comment row
    AdminCommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
    Callback interface for the "Remove" button
    AdminEventAdapter
    AdminEventAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter used by AdminBrowseEventsActivity.
    AdminEventAdapter.EventItem
    EventItem is a simple data container (a "model") for one row in the events list.
    AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder
    EventViewHolder holds references to the views inside one event row (item_admin_event.xml).
    AdminEventAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
    OnDeleteClickListener is a callback interface.
    AdminEventAdapter.OnRowClickListener
    callback interface for tapping a row (not the delete button)
    AdminEventDetailActivity
    AdminEventDetailActivity shows details of an event when clicked on from the admin browsing but only the relevant details and the comments (so comments can be removed) Only "relevant" details are the fields that the user can freely fill out, because those ones could contain policy violations.
    AdminHomeActivity
    AdminHomeActivity is the main home page for admin to browse (and delete) events/profiles/images (and later notifications, too) User stories: 03.01.01, 03.02.01, 03.03.01
    AdminImageAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for image thumbnail, image type label (poster or Profile Photo) label (event title or user name), remove button US 03.03.01 and US 03.06.01
    AdminImageAdapter.ImageItem
    Data container for one image row
    AdminImageAdapter.ImageViewHolder
    ImageViewHolder holds reference to views in one image row
    AdminImageAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
    Callback interface for Remove button
    AdminNotificationAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for AdminNotificationLogActivity US 03.08.01 - as an admin, I want to review notification logs
    AdminNotificationAdapter.NotifItem
    NotifItem data container for one notification row
    AdminNotificationAdapter.NotifViewHolder
    NotifViewHolder holds references to views inside one notification
    AdminNotificationLogActivity
    allows admin to review all notifications that've been sent No notifications get deleted.
    AdminOrganizerAdapter
    RecyclerView Adapter for browsing organizers as an admin Takes list of OrganizerItem objects, binds them to layout for display
    AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnDemoteClickListener
    interface for remove organizer status button clicks (demote button)
    AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerItem
    simple class for holding one organizer row
    AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerViewHolder
    VieHolder class for one organizer row, chaches references for efficiency
    AdminUserAdapter
    Adapter for browsing profiles as an admin, takes a list of UserItem objects and makes them into the item_admin_user layout (so admins can browse them) using a RecyclerView
    AdminUserAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
    interface to handle delete button clicks
    AdminUserAdapter.UserItem
    simple class to hold the info for one user row, containing all of their info for ease of use
    AdminUserAdapter.UserViewHolder
    The ViewHolder class, holds the view for one user row, cachine the view references
